body.title: Granny daemon: polling loop — sprint-ready tickets → route → dispatch
body.result: GrannyDaemon polling loop: _load_sprint_tickets, _ticket_needs_cc, run_once with dedup, daemon thread + singleton; 15 tests
body.description:
GrannyWeatherwaxDevice is currently a library with no run loop. For factory mode, Granny needs a daemon that: (1) polls cc_queue every 60s for tickets with status=sprint and worker=claude (or unassigned Platform/Infrastructure/etc tags), (2) calls device.intake_ticket() then device.route_ticket() on each, (3) skips tickets already in_progress or gated, (4) deduplicates to avoid double-dispatch on repeat polls.

The daemon lives in devices/granny/daemon.py and is started by the ./granny launcher. Runs until SIGTERM. Logs routing decisions at INFO. Posts startup/heartbeat to shared channel.

**Affected files:** devices/granny/daemon.py (new), devices/granny/shim.py (start() calls daemon in background thread)
**Design rules:** no SQLite; daemon uses cc_queue.py via subprocess or cc_queue module directly
**Scope boundary:** polling + routing only. Does not do the actual CC work — that's the CC task listener. No ticket modification except dispatch call.
**Test plan:** mock cc_queue returning 2 sprint-ready tickets; assert route_ticket called twice; assert GRANNY_DISPATCH channel messages emitted; assert dedup (same ticket not dispatched twice in one poll cycle)
